homepage.miniTitle: Trusted by early users. Built for reliability
homepage.para-1: From cleaning and moving to beauty care, event planning, repairs, and tutoring. Helpora connects you with trusted, verified local professionals who get things done quickly and reliably.

section1.text5: Get Found. Get Booked. Get Clients Today!

section2.text2: Choose from a wide range of home, beauty, fitness, and childcare services — all in one place.

section3.text1: Premium Home Services, Delivered with Care
section3.text2: We connect you with trained, verified professionals for all your daily needs. From cleaning to repairs, from tutoring to wellness — get trusted help whenever you need it.

section5.text1: Your journey begins here. Explore more and enjoy a seamless experience.

section6.text3: Discover our comprehensive range of professional services tailored to meet your needs
section6.text5: Can't find what you're looking for?
section6.text6: Contact us for custom service solutions

section7.text3: Helpora.cz is more than a digital marketplace — it’s a growing network of local service providers, homeowners, and professionals who collaborate to make life simpler.
section7.text4: Families find verified cleaners, movers, and tutors
section7.text6: Communities grow through cooperation & digital innovation
section7.text7: Each job done well strengthens trust — and builds a more connected, supportive economy.

section8.text3: We’re expanding across Czech cities and regions, adding more services and opportunities each month.
section8.text4: Whether you’re a professional looking to grow your business, or someone who simply wants life made easier, Helpora.cz is here to help.
section8.text5: Join us in building a better, smarter way to get things done — locally, simply, and together.

section9.text2: Helpora was created with a simple vision: to make it effortless for people to find trusted help for everyday tasks, while giving skilled individuals a platform to earn and grow their work.
section9.text3: We believe in fairness, transparency, and community. Every service request supports local professionals from cleaners and technicians to tutors and beauty specialists.
section9.text4: Helpora blends technology with a human touch, making everyday tasks easier and life more convenient.

section10.text3: Helpora.cz was founded by a small team of operations and technology professionals who saw a gap — people struggle to find trusted help for daily tasks, while skilled individuals lack visibility and stable work.
section10.text4: Inspired by global service platforms and the Czech spirit of reliability, we started developing an ecosystem that brings both sides together — fair, local, and digital.
section10.text5: Our founder envisioned a platform where technology empowers people, not replaces them. Every service request creates an opportunity for customers to save time and for professionals to grow their livelihood.

section11.text3: Our mission is to make trusted local help accessible to everyone while empowering professionals to thrive through honest work.
section11.text5: Every booking and interaction is built on trust.
section11.text7: Clear pricing, verified partners, and visible feedback.
section11.text9: Fair opportunities for workers & small businesses.
section11.text11: Seamless booking, fast support, smooth experience.

section12.text2: Let’s connect and find the best solution for you.

messagePopup.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again.

section14.text1: Your trusted marketplace for everyday services across the Czech Republic.

section15.text3: Create a free Helpora account with your email.
section15.text4: Fill in basic info: name, city/region, contact details, and choose “Provider” role.
section15.text7: Add your skills, services you offer, availability schedule, and hourly/rate price (or price tiers).
section15.text8: Write a short bio describing your experience and specialties.
section15.text10: Submit required documents (ID verification, any required licenses or certifications, if applicable).
section15.text11: Helpora checks and approves your profile to ensure trust & quality.
section15.text13: Read and accept Helpora’s provider agreement and code of conduct.
section15.text14: Confirm that you will follow platform rules for quality, conduct, and service delivery.
section15.text16: Once approved, your profile becomes visible to clients.
section15.text17: Clients can book you directly; you’ll get notifications and start getting service requests.

section16.text3: Get fast, reliable, and verified support for your home, family, and daily tasks. Choose a service, tell us what you need, and get matched with trusted providers near you.
section16.text6: Select the service type you need.
section16.text7: Cleaning, moving, repairs, caregiving, tutoring, IT help, and more.
section16.text10: Share your location, preferred time, and any details that matter.
section16.text12: We notify trusted providers close to you.
section16.text13: You receive offers or a direct confirmation.
section16.text16: Your provider arrives at the scheduled time.
section16.text17: You pay securely only after the service is completed.
section16.text30: Fill out a short form to help us match you with the right provider.
section16.text36: Where should the service take place?
section16.text37: Do you have any special requests?
section16.text39: Enter your name, email, or phone number so we can confirm your booking.
section16.text41: We search for trusted providers near your location.
section16.text42: You will see available offers with profiles, ratings, and price estimates.
section16.text44: Review the options and select the provider that fits your needs.
section16.text46: Check the details and confirm the booking.
section16.text47: You will receive a confirmation message with all the information.
section16.text48: Absolutely — here are clean, friendly, and future-proof FAQ answers you can add to your “Book a service” page.
section16.text49: They work even if you don’t have payments enabled yet, and they set the right expectation for when you introduce payments later.

section19.text3: Sign in to manage your account.
section19.text10: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.

section20.text3: Join us today and start your journey
section20.text11: By signing up, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy

section20.text15: I agree to the Privacy Policy & GDPR consent

section23.text2: Change to password of you choice

section24.text1: Do I pay before the service?
section24.text2: No. At this moment, all payments are handled directly between you and the provider.
section24.text3: In the future, we will offer secure online payments through the platform.
section24.text4: What if the payment does not work?
section24.text5: If you ever experience a problem with payment, you can contact us for help.
section24.text6: You can also pay the provider directly as a backup method.
section24.text7: When online payments become available, we will offer clear instructions and support.
section24.text8: What if no provider accepts my request?
section24.text9: If no provider is available, we will notify you.
section24.text10: You can choose to wait, try another time, or select a different service category.
section24.text11: You can also save your request so we can contact you when someone becomes available.
section24.text12: Can i cancel or change my booking?
section24.text13: Yes. You can cancel or change your booking before the service starts.
section24.text14: If you have questions, we will help you make the change.
section24.text16: Yes. All providers go through a review and verification process before joining our platform.
section24.text17: This helps ensure safety and quality for all customers.
section24.text18: How do i know the price?
section24.text19: You will see an estimated price or hourly rate before booking.
section24.text20: The final cost will be confirmed with the provider before the service.
section24.text21: How can i communicate with the provider?
section24.text22: After sending your request, you will be connected with your provider.
section24.text23: You can discuss details, ask questions, and confirm any changes.
section24.text25: Yes. We only share the information needed to complete the service.
section24.text26: Your details are kept secure and private.
section24.text27: What if i have a problem with the service?
section24.text29: We will work with you and the provider to solve the issue.
section24.text30: Do i need an account to book a service?
section24.text31: You can book with your email or phone number.
section24.text32: A full account will give you more features in the future.

section33.text2: Select a chat to start messaging

section39.text2: I booked a hair styling session and was amazed at the result. The stylist understood exactly what I wanted and delivered it better than expected.
section39.text4: The facial treatment was relaxing and professional. My skin feels brighter and healthier. I’m coming back for sure.
section39.text6: Beautiful nail work! Very neat, long-lasting, and exactly the style I wanted. Highly recommended.
section39.text8: One of the best massages I’ve had. The therapist knew where the tension was and relieved it perfectly.
section39.text10: The cleaning was spotless! The team worked efficiently and left the apartment looking fresh and organized.
section39.text12: Great trainer! Motivating, knowledgeable, and patient. I finally feel progress with my workouts.
section39.text14: My son improved quickly thanks to the tutor’s clear explanations and friendly approach. Very satisfied.
section39.text16: Fast and reliable towing service. They arrived sooner than expected and handled the car professionally.

section1.title: 1. Agreement
section1.body: By using our platform, you agree to these Terms and our Service Level Agreement (SLA).

section2.title: 2. Provider Responsibilities
section2.body: Providers must deliver services professionally, communicate clearly with clients, and keep their availability accurate.

section3.title: 3. Billing and Subscriptions
section3.body: Provider access to the dashboard requires an active subscription. Billing is handled securely by Stripe.

section4.title: 4. Cancellations
section4.body: You can cancel your subscription in the Stripe billing portal. Access continues until the current billing period ends.

section5.title: 5. Support
section5.body: If you have questions about these terms, contact our support team.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy explains how Helpora.cz (“we”, “us”, or “our”) collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
By using the Helpora.cz website and services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 2. Data Controller
paragraphs: The data controller responsible for the processing of personal data is:

sections.title: 3. Personal Data We Process
paragraphs: We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:
bullets: Business information (company name, service category, location)
Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)
Billing and subscription information (subscription status, invoices)
We do not store payment card details. All payments are processed securely by Stripe.

sections.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
paragraphs: We process personal data for the following purposes:
bullets: Providing access to the Helpora.cz platform
Ensuring platform security and preventing misuse
Complying with legal and regulatory obligations

sections.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
paragraphs: Personal data is processed based on one or more of the following legal grounds:
bullets: Contractual necessity – to provide our services
Legitimate interest – to operate, secure, and improve the platform
Legal obligation – where required by applicable law

sections.title: 6. Marketing Communications
paragraphs: We send marketing or promotional communications only if you have provided explicit consent.
You may withdraw your consent at any time by:
bullets: Clicking the unsubscribe link in marketing emails
Service-related emails, such as account notifications or billing updates, are sent regardless of marketing consent.

sections.title: 7. Data Sharing and Third Parties
paragraphs: We may share personal data with trusted third parties only when necessary to provide our services, including:
bullets: Analytics or security service providers (where applicable)
All third parties process personal data in compliance with GDPR.

sections.title: 8. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to:
bullets: Protect our legal rights and legitimate interests
Users may request account deletion and data erasure at any time.

sections.title: 9. Data Security
paragraphs: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including:

sections.title: 10. Your Rights Under GDPR
paragraphs: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
bullets: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
Restrict or object to data processing
Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
Requests may be sent to: info@helpora.cz

sections.title: 11. Cookies
paragraphs: Helpora.cz uses cookies that are necessary for website functionality.
Analytical or marketing cookies are used only with user consent. Further details are provided in our Cookie Policy.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Privacy Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated revision date.

sections.title: 13. Contact
paragraphs: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or the processing of personal data, please contact:

subscription.title: Activate Your Provider Plan
subscription.subtitle: Subscribe to unlock the provider dashboard and start receiving bookings.
subscription.description: Monthly subscription for service providers on helpora.cz. This plan allows providers to create and maintain an active profile, appear in search results, and be contacted directly by customers. The subscription renews automatically each month and can be canceled at any time. Helpora.cz provides visibility and contact opportunities but does not guarantee a specific number of leads or bookings.
